# Counter Intrusion | Anduril

Anduril's Counter Intrusion systems—Sentry, Pulsar, Wisp, and Ghost—are a family of autonomous ground and maritime security solutions powered by Lattice, providing persistent awareness to protect bases, borders, and critical infrastructure.
